From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1974 Cannes Film Festival

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Official poster of the 27th Cannes Film Festival, an original illustration by *Georges Lacroix*.[[1]](#cite_note-1) | |
| Opening film | *[Amarcord](/wiki/Amarcord "Amarcord")* |
| Closing film | *[S\*P\*Y\*S](/wiki/S*P*Y*S "S*P*Y*S")* |
| Location | [Cannes](/wiki/Cannes "Cannes"), [France](/wiki/France "France") |
| Founded | 1946 |
| Awards | *[Grand Prix](/wiki/Palme_d%27Or "Palme d'Or")*: *[The Conversation](/wiki/The_Conversation "The Conversation")* |
| No. of films | 26 (In Competition)[[2]](#cite_note-selection-2) |
| Festival date | 9 May 1974 (1974-05-09) – 24 May 1974 (1974-05-24) |
| Website | [festival-cannes.com/en](http://festival-cannes.com/en) |
| [Cannes Film Festival](/wiki/Cannes_Film_Festival "Cannes Film Festival") | |
| [1975](/wiki/1975_Cannes_Film_Festival "1975 Cannes Film Festival")  [1973](/wiki/1973_Cannes_Film_Festival "1973 Cannes Film Festival") | |

The **27th [Cannes Film Festival](/wiki/Cannes_Film_Festival "Cannes Film Festival")** took place from 9 to 24 May 1974. French filmmaker [René Clair](/wiki/Ren%C3%A9_Clair "René Clair") served as jury president for the main competition.

The [*Grand Prix*](/wiki/Palme_d%27Or "Palme d'Or"), then the festival's main prize, was awarded to American filmmaker [Francis Ford Coppola](/wiki/Francis_Ford_Coppola "Francis Ford Coppola") for the drama film *[The Conversation](/wiki/The_Conversation "The Conversation")*.[[3]](#cite_note-cinemafr-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)

The festival opened with *[Amarcord](/wiki/Amarcord "Amarcord")* by [Federico Fellini](/wiki/Federico_Fellini "Federico Fellini"),[[5]](#cite_note-5)[[6]](#cite_note-6) and closed with *[S\*P\*Y\*S](/wiki/S*P*Y*S "S*P*Y*S")* by [Irvin Kershner](/wiki/Irvin_Kershner "Irvin Kershner").[[7]](#cite_note-7)

## Juries

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1974_Cannes_Film_Festival&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Juries")]

### Main Competition

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1974_Cannes_Film_Festival&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Main Competition")]

* [René Clair](/wiki/Ren%C3%A9_Clair "René Clair"), French filmmaker - Jury President[[8]](#cite_note-8)
* [Jean-Loup Dabadie](/wiki/Jean-Loup_Dabadie "Jean-Loup Dabadie"), French journalist
* [Kenne Fant](/wiki/Kenne_Fant "Kenne Fant"), Swedish actor
* [Félix Labisse](/wiki/F%C3%A9lix_Labisse "Félix Labisse"), French painter
* [Irwin Shaw](/wiki/Irwin_Shaw "Irwin Shaw"), American writer
* [Michel Soutter](/wiki/Michel_Soutter "Michel Soutter"), Swiss filmmaker
* [Monica Vitti](/wiki/Monica_Vitti "Monica Vitti"), Italian actress
* [Alexander Walker](/wiki/Alexander_Walker_(critic) "Alexander Walker (critic)"), British film critic and author
* [Rostislav Yurenev](/wiki/Rostislav_Yurenev "Rostislav Yurenev"), Soviet film critic

## Official Selection

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1974_Cannes_Film_Festival&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Official Selection")]

### In Competition

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1974_Cannes_Film_Festival&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: In Competition")]

The following feature films competed for the *Grand Prix International du Festival*:[[2]](#cite_note-selection-2)

| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| *[Ali: Fear Eats the Soul](/wiki/Ali:_Fear_Eats_the_Soul "Ali: Fear Eats the Soul")* | *Angst essen Seele auf* | [Rainer Werner Fassbinder](/wiki/Rainer_Werner_Fassbinder "Rainer Werner Fassbinder") | West Germany |

| *[The Bear Cage](/wiki/The_Bear_Cage "The Bear Cage")* | *La cage aux ours* | Marian Handwerker | Belgium |
| *[Cats' Play](/wiki/Cats%27_Play "Cats' Play")* | *Macskajáték* | [Károly Makk](/wiki/K%C3%A1roly_Makk "Károly Makk") | Hungary |
| ***[The Conversation](/wiki/The_Conversation "The Conversation")*** | | **[Francis Ford Coppola](/wiki/Francis_Ford_Coppola "Francis Ford Coppola")** | **United States** |
| *Cousin Angelica* | *[La prima Angélica](/wiki/La_prima_Ang%C3%A9lica "La prima Angélica")* | [Carlos Saura](/wiki/Carlos_Saura "Carlos Saura") | Spain |
| *[Daughters, Daughters](/wiki/Daughters,_Daughters "Daughters, Daughters")* | *Abu el-Banat* | [Moshé Mizrahi](/wiki/Mosh%C3%A9_Mizrahi "Moshé Mizrahi") | Israel |
| *[Garm Hava](/wiki/Garm_Hava "Garm Hava")* | | [M. S. Sathyu](/wiki/M._S._Sathyu "M. S. Sathyu") | India |
| *[Himiko](/wiki/Himiko_(film) "Himiko (film)")* | 卑弥呼 | [Masahiro Shinoda](/wiki/Masahiro_Shinoda "Masahiro Shinoda") | Japan |
| *[The Holy Office](/wiki/The_Holy_Office_(film) "The Holy Office (film)")* | *El santo oficio* | [Arturo Ripstein](/wiki/Arturo_Ripstein "Arturo Ripstein") | Mexico |

| *[Mahler](/wiki/Mahler_(film) "Mahler (film)")* | | [Ken Russell](/wiki/Ken_Russell "Ken Russell") | United Kingdom |

| *[The Nickel Ride](/wiki/The_Nickel_Ride "The Nickel Ride")* | | [Robert Mulligan](/wiki/Robert_Mulligan "Robert Mulligan") | United States |
| *[The Nine Lives of Fritz the Cat](/wiki/The_Nine_Lives_of_Fritz_the_Cat "The Nine Lives of Fritz the Cat")* | | [Robert Taylor](/wiki/Robert_Taylor_(animator) "Robert Taylor (animator)") |

| *[The Others](/wiki/The_Others_(1974_film) "The Others (1974 film)")* | *Les autres* | [Hugo Santiago](/wiki/Hugo_Santiago "Hugo Santiago") | France |

### Out of Competition

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1974_Cannes_Film_Festival&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Out of Competition")]

The following films were selected to be screened out of competition:[[2]](#cite_note-selection-2)

* *[1789](/w/index.php?title=1789_(film)&action=edit&redlink=1 "1789 (film) (page does not exist)")* by [Ariane Mnouchkine](/wiki/Ariane_Mnouchkine "Ariane Mnouchkine")
* *[Amarcord](/wiki/Amarcord "Amarcord")* by [Federico Fellini](/wiki/Federico_Fellini "Federico Fellini")
* *[And Now My Love](/wiki/And_Now_My_Love "And Now My Love")* (*Toute une vie*) by [Claude Lelouch](/wiki/Claude_Lelouch "Claude Lelouch")
* *[Birds Do It, Bees Do It](/wiki/Birds_Do_It,_Bees_Do_It "Birds Do It, Bees Do It")* by [Nicolas Noxon](/wiki/Nicolas_Noxon "Nicolas Noxon"), [Irwin Rosten](/wiki/Irwin_Rosten "Irwin Rosten")
* *[Entr'acte](/wiki/Entr%27acte_(film) "Entr'acte (film)")* by [René Clair](/wiki/Ren%C3%A9_Clair "René Clair")
* *[The Homecoming](/wiki/The_Homecoming_(film) "The Homecoming (film)")* by [Peter Hall](/wiki/Peter_Hall_(theatre_director) "Peter Hall (theatre director)")
* *[The Grand Maneuver](/wiki/The_Grand_Maneuver "The Grand Maneuver")* (*Les Grandes Manoeuvres*) by [René Clair](/wiki/Ren%C3%A9_Clair "René Clair")
* *[Henry Miller, Poète Maudit](/w/index.php?title=Henry_Miller,_Po%C3%A8te_Maudit&action=edit&redlink=1 "Henry Miller, Poète Maudit (page does not exist)")* by [Michèle Arnault](/w/index.php?title=Mich%C3%A8le_Arnault&action=edit&redlink=1 "Michèle Arnault (page does not exist)")
* *[Lancelot du Lac](/wiki/Lancelot_du_Lac_(film) "Lancelot du Lac (film)")* by [Robert Bresson](/wiki/Robert_Bresson "Robert Bresson")
* *[Once](/w/index.php?title=Once_(1974_film)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Once (1974 film) (page does not exist)")* by [Mort Heilig](/w/index.php?title=Mort_Heilig&action=edit&redlink=1 "Mort Heilig (page does not exist)")

* *[S\*P\*Y\*S](/wiki/S*P*Y*S "S*P*Y*S")* by [Irvin Kershner](/wiki/Irvin_Kershner "Irvin Kershner")
* *[Le Trio Infernal](/w/index.php?title=Le_Trio_Infernal&action=edit&redlink=1 "Le Trio Infernal (page does not exist)")* by [Francis Girod](/wiki/Francis_Girod "Francis Girod")

### Short Films Competition

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1974_Cannes_Film_Festival&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Short Films Competition")]

The following short films competed for the [Short Film Palme d'Or](/wiki/Short_Film_Palme_d%27Or "Short Film Palme d'Or"):[[2]](#cite_note-selection-2)

* *Akvarium*  by Zdenka Doitcheva
* *Another Saturday Night* by Steven B. Poster, Mik Derks
* *Carnet trouvé chez les fourmis* by Georges Senechal
* *[Hunger](/wiki/Hunger_(1974_film) "Hunger (1974 film)")* by [Peter Foldes](/wiki/Peter_Foldes "Peter Foldes")
* *I stała się światłość* by Jerzy Kalina
* *Jocselekedetek* by Béla Vajda
* *Leonarduv denik* by [Jan Švankmajer](/wiki/Jan_%C5%A0vankmajer "Jan Švankmajer")
* *O sidarta* by Michel Jakar
* *[Ostrov](/w/index.php?title=Ostrov_(1973_film)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Ostrov (1973 film) (page does not exist)")* (*Island*) by [Fyodor Khitruk](/wiki/Fyodor_Khitruk "Fyodor Khitruk")

## Parallel sections

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1974_Cannes_Film_Festival&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: Parallel sections")]

### International Critics' Week

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1974_Cannes_Film_Festival&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: International Critics' Week")]

The following feature films were screened for the 13th [International Critics' Week](/wiki/International_Critics%27_Week "International Critics' Week") (13e Semaine de la Critique):[[9]](#cite_note-9)

* *[A Bigger Splash](/wiki/A_Bigger_Splash_(1974_biopic) "A Bigger Splash (1974 biopic)")* by Jack Hazan (United Kingdom)
* *Na wylot* by [Grzegorz Królikiewicz](/wiki/Grzegorz_Kr%C3%B3likiewicz "Grzegorz Królikiewicz") (Poland)
* *[The Spirit of the Beehive](/wiki/The_Spirit_of_the_Beehive "The Spirit of the Beehive")* (*El espíritu de la colmena*) by [Víctor Erice](/wiki/V%C3%ADctor_Erice "Víctor Erice") (Spain)
* *[Hearts and Minds](/wiki/Hearts_and_Minds_(film) "Hearts and Minds (film)")* by [Peter Davis](/wiki/Peter_Davis_(director) "Peter Davis (director)") (United States)
* *The Hour of Liberation Has Arrived* (*L’heure de la libération a sonné*) by [Heiny Srour](/wiki/Heiny_Srour "Heiny Srour") (Lebanon)
* *I.F.Stone’s Weekly* by Jerry Bruck Jr (United States)
* *[La Paloma](/w/index.php?title=La_Paloma_(1974_film)&action=edit&redlink=1 "La Paloma (1974 film) (page does not exist)") [[fr](https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/La_Paloma_(film,_1974) "fr:La Paloma (film, 1974)")]* by [Daniel Schmid](/wiki/Daniel_Schmid "Daniel Schmid") (Switzerland)
* *[The Promised Land](/wiki/The_Promised_Land_(1973_film) "The Promised Land (1973 film)")* by [Miguel Littín](/wiki/Miguel_Litt%C3%ADn "Miguel Littín") (Chile)
* *[Der Tod des Flohzirkusdirektos](/w/index.php?title=Der_Tod_des_Flohzirkusdirektos&action=edit&redlink=1 "Der Tod des Flohzirkusdirektos (page does not exist)")* by [Thomas Koerfer](/wiki/Thomas_Koerfer "Thomas Koerfer") (Switzerland)

### Directors' Fortnight

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1974_Cannes_Film_Festival&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Directors' Fortnight")]

The following films were screened for the 1974 [Directors' Fortnight](/wiki/Directors%27_Fortnight "Directors' Fortnight") (Quinzaine des Réalizateurs):[[10]](#cite_note-10)

* *A Noite Do Espantalho* by [Sergio Ricardo](/wiki/S%C3%A9rgio_Ricardo_(director) "Sérgio Ricardo (director)") (Brazil)
* *A Rainha Diaba* by Antonio Carlos Fontura (Brazil)
* *Au-delà des sables* by [Radu Gabrea](/wiki/Radu_Gabrea "Radu Gabrea") (Romania)
* *[Celine and Julie Go Boating](/wiki/Celine_and_Julie_Go_Boating "Celine and Julie Go Boating") (Céline et Julie vont en bateau)* by [Jacques Rivette](/wiki/Jacques_Rivette "Jacques Rivette") (France)
* *Contra la Razon y por la Fuerza* (doc.) by Carlos Ortiz Tejeda (Mexico)
* *La Coupe à 10 francs* by Philippe Condroyer (France)
* *Erica Minor* by [Bertrand Van Effenterre](/wiki/Bertrand_Van_Effenterre "Bertrand Van Effenterre") (Switzerland)
* *[The Expropriation](/wiki/The_Expropriation "The Expropriation")* (*La expropiación*) by [Raúl Ruiz](/wiki/Ra%C3%BAl_Ruiz_(director) "Raúl Ruiz (director)") (Chile)
* *The Extradition* (*Die Auslieferung*) by [Peter von Gunten](/wiki/Peter_von_Gunten "Peter von Gunten") (Switzerland)
* *[Gelegenheitsarbeit einer Sklavin](/wiki/Gelegenheitsarbeit_einer_Sklavin "Gelegenheitsarbeit einer Sklavin")* by [Alexander Kluge](/wiki/Alexander_Kluge "Alexander Kluge") (West Germany)
* *¡Hay que matar al general!* (*Operación Alfa*) by Enrique Urteaga (Chile)
* *Il pleut toujours où c'est mouillé* by [Jean-Daniel Simon](/wiki/Jean-Daniel_Simon "Jean-Daniel Simon") (France)
* *Lars Ole, 5C* by [Nils Malmros](/wiki/Nils_Malmros "Nils Malmros") (Denmark)
* *[The Last Betrothal](/wiki/The_Last_Betrothal "The Last Betrothal") (Les Dernières Fiançailles)* by [Jean Pierre Lefebvre](/wiki/Jean_Pierre_Lefebvre "Jean Pierre Lefebvre") (Canada)
* *Let Mrtve Ptice* by [Živojin Pavlović](/wiki/%C5%BDivojin_Pavlovi%C4%87 "Živojin Pavlović") (Yugoslavia)
* *Manifest* by Antonis Lepeniotis (Austria)
* *[Mean Streets](/wiki/Mean_Streets "Mean Streets")* by [Martin Scorsese](/wiki/Martin_Scorsese "Martin Scorsese") (United States)
* *[The Migrants](/wiki/The_Migrants "The Migrants")* by [Tom Gries](/wiki/Tom_Gries "Tom Gries") (United States)
* *[Morel's Invention](/wiki/Morel%27s_Invention_(film) "Morel's Invention (film)")* (*L'invenzione di Morel*) by [Emidio Greco](/wiki/Emidio_Greco "Emidio Greco") (Italy)
* *[Once Upon a Time There Was a Singing Blackbird](/wiki/Once_Upon_a_Time_There_Was_a_Singing_Blackbird "Once Upon a Time There Was a Singing Blackbird")* (*Iko shashvi mgalobeli*) by [Otar Iosseliani](/wiki/Otar_Iosseliani "Otar Iosseliani") (Soviet Union)
* *[Padatik](/wiki/Padatik_(1973_film) "Padatik (1973 film)")* by [Mrinal Sen](/wiki/Mrinal_Sen "Mrinal Sen") (India)
* *Processo Per Direttisima* by Lucio De Caro (Italy)
* *[The Profiteer](/wiki/The_Profiteer "The Profiteer")* (*Il Saprofita*) by [Sergio Nasca](/wiki/Sergio_Nasca "Sergio Nasca") (Italy)
* *[Sweet Movie](/wiki/Sweet_Movie "Sweet Movie")* by [Dušan Makavejev](/wiki/Du%C5%A1an_Makavejev "Dušan Makavejev") (Canada, France, West Germany)
* *Uira* by Gustavo Dahl (Brazil)
* *Vai Travalhar Vagabundo* by Hugo Carvanna (Brazil)
* *La Vérité sur l'imaginaire passion d'un inconnu* by Marcel Hanoun (France)

:   **Short films**

* *L'Agression* by Frank Cassenti (France)
* *Au nom de Jésus* by José Rodrigues Dos Santos, Gérard Loubeau (Ivory Coast)
* *Brainwash* by Ronald Bijlsma (Netherlands)
* *Film sur Hans Bellmeer* by Catherine Binet (France)
* *Liberté-Jean* by [Jean-Michel Carré](/wiki/Jean-Michel_Carr%C3%A9 "Jean-Michel Carré") (France)
* *Une puce sur un no man's land* by Marie-France Molle (France)
* *Stillborn* by Ladd Mc Portlan] (United States)
* *Winda* by Jerzy Kucia (Poland)

## Official Awards

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1974_Cannes_Film_Festival&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Official Awards")]

### Main Competition

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1974_Cannes_Film_Festival&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Main Competition")]

* [*Grand Prix du Festival International du Film*](/wiki/Palme_d%27Or "Palme d'Or"): *[The Conversation](/wiki/The_Conversation "The Conversation")* by [Francis Ford Coppola](/wiki/Francis_Ford_Coppola "Francis Ford Coppola")[[3]](#cite_note-cinemafr-3)
* [Grand Prix Spécial du Jury](/wiki/Grand_Prix_(Cannes_Film_Festival) "Grand Prix (Cannes Film Festival)"): *[Arabian Nights](/wiki/Arabian_Nights_(1974_film) "Arabian Nights (1974 film)")* by [Pier Paolo Pasolini](/wiki/Pier_Paolo_Pasolini "Pier Paolo Pasolini")
* [Best Screenplay](/wiki/Best_Screenplay_Award_(Cannes_Film_Festival) "Best Screenplay Award (Cannes Film Festival)"): [Hal Barwood](/wiki/Hal_Barwood "Hal Barwood"), [Matthew Robbins](/wiki/Matthew_Robbins_(screenwriter) "Matthew Robbins (screenwriter)") and [Steven Spielberg](/wiki/Steven_Spielberg "Steven Spielberg") for *[The Sugarland Express](/wiki/The_Sugarland_Express "The Sugarland Express")*
* [Best Actress](/wiki/Best_Actress_Award_(Cannes_Film_Festival) "Best Actress Award (Cannes Film Festival)"): [Marie-José Nat](/wiki/Marie-Jos%C3%A9_Nat "Marie-José Nat") for *[Violins at the Ball](/wiki/Violins_at_the_Ball "Violins at the Ball")*
* [Best Actor](/wiki/Best_Actor_Award_(Cannes_Film_Festival) "Best Actor Award (Cannes Film Festival)"): [Jack Nicholson](/wiki/Jack_Nicholson "Jack Nicholson") for *[The Last Detail](/wiki/The_Last_Detail "The Last Detail")*
* [Jury Prize](/wiki/Jury_Prize_(Cannes_Film_Festival) "Jury Prize (Cannes Film Festival)"): *[La prima Angélica](/wiki/La_prima_Ang%C3%A9lica "La prima Angélica")* by [Carlos Saura](/wiki/Carlos_Saura "Carlos Saura")

### Short Films Competition

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=1974_Cannes_Film_Festival&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Short Films Competition")]

* [*Grand Prix International du Festival*](/wiki/Short_Film_Palme_d%27Or "Short Film Palme d'Or"): *Ostrov* by [Fyodor Khitruk](/wiki/Fyodor_Khitruk "Fyodor Khitruk")
* **Jury Prize**: *[Hunger](/wiki/Hunger_(1974_film) "Hunger (1974 film)")* by [Peter Foldes](/wiki/Peter_Foldes "Peter Foldes")
